description: Install or update OpenCode when approved, sync repo-local OpenCode assets safely, and report provider auth as manual-required when pending.
manual_steps: Provider authentication, if desired, must be completed by the user with opencode auth login.
success_criteria: opencode --version exits successfully or is reported as blocked by approval/platform/network
Repo-local OpenCode assets are copied only when missing or when ownership is proven
Provider auth is reported as configured, pending/manual-required, or failed
scripts/doctor reports no failed auto-safe items
